title: murder drones railgun and skins
description: cool railgun and 2 custom skins and an custom elytra
body:
skins n and thad from murder drones n with his tall and thad with his hat and railgun hopely working and an cool elytra onl works with N though also thanks to tom5454 for the customizable player models that i used to get the custom elytra, tail, and hat to work properly ( you have to load Player_Models files and select eather n or thad to be able to use the tail and elitra for n or the hat with thad) there is also an railgun only obtainable in creative under combat tab will shoot arrows and insta kill any mob or enity. (very overpowered in combat)
there are an few bugs like the hat sometimes working trying to fix also thie railgun will fire when not in hand working on fixing. in the prosses of adding uzi and other murder drones skins.
